params.dAppRecipient: Where to send the dApp's share (CollateralVault)
params.totalFee: Total fee amount in G$ from trading operation

addImpactPartner(address,uint256).notice: Add impact organization for revenue sharing.         Enables partnerships with social impact organizations.

getMonthlyUBIEstimate().notice: Calculate estimated monthly UBI contribution from 24/7 trading.         Target: $8K+ monthly from tokenized equities.

getSocialImpactRate().notice: Calculate systematic social impact rate.         Returns UBI generated per G$ of trading volume.

getStocksUBIStats().notice: Get tokenized equities specific UBI statistics.

getTodayUBIImpact().notice: Get current day's UBI impact for real-time monitoring.

setGoodDollar(address).notice: Update the GoodDollar token address when redeployed

splitBurnFee(uint256,address,address,str.notice: Split burn fees specifically (0.3% of position value).         Called by CollateralVault when users burn synthetic tokens.

splitFee(uint256,address).notice: Split trading fees from CollateralVault.         Called for mint fees, burn fees, and liquidation proceeds.

splitLiquidationProceeds(uint256,address.notice: Split liquidation proceeds.         Called by CollateralVault when undercollateralized positions are liquidated.

splitMintFee(uint256,address,address,str.notice: Split mint fees specifically (0.3% of position value).         Called by CollateralVault when users mint synthetic tokens.
